summary.zh-tw: 本地疫苗接種紀錄管理工具，含互動儀表板、紀錄編輯與篩選、劑次追蹤、時間線報告與加強劑提醒。
summary.en: Local vaccination record manager with an interactive dashboard, record editing, filtering, dose tracking, timeline reports, and booster reminders.
